alternative_parents.description: Steroid derivatives carrying a C=O group at the 17-position of the steroid skeleton.
alternative_parents.name: 17-oxosteroids

alternative_parents.description: Benzenesulfonic acids (or derivative thereof) carrying a methyl group at the para- position.
alternative_parents.name: p-Methylbenzenesulfonates

alternative_parents.description: Arenesulfonate esters that result from the formal condensation of the hydroxy group of an alcohol, enol, phenol or heteroarenol with benzenesulfonic acid.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenesulfonate esters

alternative_parents.description: Organosulfur compounds containing a tosyl group, with the general formula CH3C6H4S(O2)R (R =  any atom).
alternative_parents.name: Tosyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Aromatic compounds containing a benzenesulfonyl group, which consists of a monocyclic benzene moiety that carries a sulfonyl group.
alternative_parents.name: Benzenesulfonyl compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an aryl group attached to the sulfonic acid group (or a derivative thereof).
alternative_parents.name: Arylsulfonic acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Esters of sulfonic acid, which have the general structure RS(=O)2OR' (R,R' = organyl, not H).
alternative_parents.name: Organosulfonic acid esters

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing the sulfonyl group, with the general structure RS(=O)2R' ( R,R' must not be H).
alternative_parents.name: Sulfonyls

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds  in which a carbonyl group is bonded to two carbon atoms R2C=O (neither R may be a hydrogen atom). Ketones that have one or more alpha-hydrogen atoms undergo keto-enol tautomerization, the tautomer being an enol.
alternative_parents.name: Ketones

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Compounds based on the cyclopenta[a]phenanthrene carbon skeleton, partially or completely hydrogenated; there are usually methyl groups at C-10 and C-13, and often an alkyl group at C-17. By extension, one or more bond scissions, ring expansions and/or ring contractions of the skeleton may have occurred.
class.name: Steroids and steroid derivatives

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as androstane steroids. These are steroids with a structure based on the 19-carbon androstane skeleton.

direct_parent.description: Steroids with a structure based on the 19-carbon androstane skeleton.
direct_parent.name: Androstane steroids

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Steroids with a structure based on the 19-carbon androstane skeleton.
subclass.name: Androstane steroids

superclass.description: Fatty acids and their derivatives, and substances related biosynthetically or functionally to these compounds.
superclass.name: Lipids and lipid-like molecules
